title: Transcript Summarization
scenario: Given a transcript of a conversation, summarize the key points into a specific section-based format. The transcript should be provided in plain text, and the output summary should be in a structured format (e.g., headings, bullet points).
constraints: Must cover at least 3 key points in the transcript
Must use headings and bullet points for structure

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the summary accurately captures the key points in the transcript
Assess the readability of the summary
Evaluate if the summary maintains a consistent structure (e.g., headings, bullet points)
Check if the summary is grammatically correct and properly punctuated
